title: Vizsla project manifest
description: Project manifest for the Vizsla Verilog/SystemVerilog language server.

top_modules.description: Top-level module names for the compilation profile.

defines.description: Predefined macros. Use NAME or NAME=value strings.

sources.description: Source files or directories to scan. Omitted sources do not scan the workspace root.

include_dirs.description: Include search directories. When omitted, Vizsla uses the final sources as include directories.

libraries.description: External library or dependency workspace paths.

exclude.description: Paths to remove from sources, include directories, and libraries.
